markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Kansas City and Baltimore go to extra innings in the Kansas City vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Kansas City vs Baltimore game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Kansas City wins the Kansas City vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Kansas City vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Kansas City vs Baltimore Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Van Zyl / Van Zyl wins the Cirotte / Duerst vs Van Zyl / Van Zyl professional tennis match in the 2026 W35 Hillcrest Quarterfinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Cirotte / Duerst vs Van Zyl / Van Zyl professional tennis match in the 2026 W35 Hillcrest Quarterfinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Van Zyl / Van Zyl win the Cirotte / Duerst vs Van Zyl / Van Zyl: W35 Hillcrest Quarterfinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Cirotte / Duerst wins the Cirotte / Duerst vs Van Zyl / Van Zyl professional tennis match in the 2026 W35 Hillcrest Quarterfinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Cirotte / Duerst vs Van Zyl / Van Zyl professional tennis match in the 2026 W35 Hillcrest Quarterfinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Cirotte / Duerst win the Cirotte / Duerst vs Van Zyl / Van Zyl: W35 Hillcrest Quarterfinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nick Gonzales records 1+ stolen bases in Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 8, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Nick Gonzales is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Nick Gonzales starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Nick Gonzales is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Nick Gonzales is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Nick Gonzales: 1+ stolen bases?
